SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROSALIND ROONGSEANG PLUTA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF SCOTT PLUTA IS NOT PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY WIFE ROSALIND ROONGSEANG PLUTA VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DAN PERATA TRAINING, INC. IS PRESENT. CORRECTION WAS MADE ON BUSINESS NAME FROM DANIEL PERATA TRAINING INC. TO DAN PERATA TRAINING INC. DEFENDANT NATASHA KORAL IS PRESENT, AS (OWNER). PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-01-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS ROSALIND ROONSEANG PLUTA AND SCOTT PLUTA ARE PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT DANIEL PERATA TRAINING REPRESENTED BY NATASHA KORAL, OWNER IS PRESENT. CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFFS TO TIMELY SUBMIT REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLUTA, ROSALIND ROONGSEANG PLUTA, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAN PERATA  TRAINING, INC. $3,851.65 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,941.65, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION.
